summary: Frontend-only testing of Liquid Glass redesign. All major features working: dashboard, reservations, detail view, calendar, modal form creation.

issues: Day 14 highlighted with indigo/purple gradient circle - working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Form inputs have no name/id attributes - relying on placeholder for testing. Consider adding id/name or data-testid to inputs for better testability.
Direct URL navigation to /reservations doesn't work (blank page) - must use /reservaciones. React Router routes appear to be in Spanish but no English redirects exist.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test reservation: TEST Cliente Prueba, Boda, 15/06/2026, $80,000
context_for_next_testing_agent: App uses /reservaciones (Spanish URL) not /reservations. Form inputs have no name/id attributes - use placeholder selectors. Modal form requires scrolling to reach bottom fields. All 3 reservations in DB. App is fully functional with liquid glass design.

features_tested.dashboard_liquid_glass: PASS - blobs, glass cards, gradient text all present
features_tested.nueva_reserva_modal: PASS - Opens with glass-modal rounded-3xl class
features_tested.form_submission: PASS - Toast 'Reserva creada' shown, modal closes
features_tested.reservations_list: PASS - Glass table with 3 rows, filters work
features_tested.reservation_detail_2col: PASS - Glass cards with 2 column layout
features_tested.status_select: PASS - data-testid=status-select updates status, toast shown
features_tested.edit_modal_prefilled: PASS - Edit opens modal with prefilled client name
features_tested.calendar_today_highlighted: PASS - Day 14 highlighted with gradient circle
features_tested.calendar_month_navigation: PASS - Prev/next buttons navigate between months
features_tested.event_type_legend: PASS - Legend pills at bottom: Boda, Quinceañera, Fiesta Social, etc.
features_tested.sidebar_active_link: PASS - Active link has gradient indigo/purple background rounded-2xl
